channel.title: Climate Pledge Arena
channel.description: Upcoming events for Climate Pledge Arena

item.title: Seattle Kraken Suites
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Event details

item.title: Seattle Kraken vs. Los Angeles Kings
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list. BAG POLICY STRICTLY ENFORCED BAG POLICY STRICTLY ENFORCED https://www.climatepledgearena.com/arena-guide/#bag-policy

Event details

item.title: All Access Pass – Climate Pledge Arena Tours
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Kraken Game Day Tours Beat the crowds and take a guided VIP tour before watching the Kraken take the ice. -Be the first fans in the arena -Guarantee your game night giveaway (if applicable) -Beat the crowds and shop the team store before doors open *Please note the tour lasts about 45-60 minutes

Event details

item.title: Preseason: Seattle Storm vs. Portland Fire
item.description:
Wednesday, April 29, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Children 3 and older require a paid ticket for entry. Group discounts available for groups of 10 or more. Please contact the Seattle Storm at 206-272-2742 for more information on group experiences. Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list.

item.title: Stifel Stars on Ice
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list.

Event details

item.title: Stifel Stars on Ice Pre-Show Stargazer Pass
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

THIS IS AN OPTIONAL UPGRADE. TICKET TO THE MAIN EVENT IS ALSO REQUIRED. Pre-Show Stargazer Event takes place prior to Stars on Ice show. Enjoy early entry, watch the skater warm-ups, and participate in a Q&A with several skaters from specified seating sections. Due to this event taking place prior to doors opening, EVERYONE entering the venue early must have an event ticket AND Pre-Show Stargazer Pass for entry. This includes all children as well as the parent(s)/guardian(s) wishing to accompany them into the building. If you plan on attending the Pre-Show Stargazer Event, please make sure you have BOTH tickets. NO EXCEPTIONS. Late arrivals will not be refunded. OPTIONAL UPSELL. NOT VALID FOR EVENT ADMISSION. MUST ALSO HAVE EVENT TICKET! FAN MUST BRING UPSELL TICKET TO EVENT DAY FOR ENTRY. NOTE SPECIFIC PRE-SHOW ACCESS START TIME! STARGAZER PASS TICKET REQUIRED FOR ENTRY.

Event details

item.title: Alex Warren: Finding Family on the Road
item.description:
Saturday, June 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Alex Warren is contributing $1 from every ticket sold to Camp Kesem, providing free camps and programs for kids with parents fighting cancer - through his partnership with PLUS1. Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list. Alex Warren is contributing $1 from every ticket sold to Camp Kesem, providing free camps and programs for kids with parents fighting cancer?through his partnership with PLUS1. All Ages Welcome!
